structural_completeness.record_purpose: Phase 2 ten-field survival-psychology and conditional-gate applicability records
observations: All twelve expected unit ids are present and every unit contains all ten named psychology fields with nonempty text; the shortest of the 120 field values is 39 characters.
Every unit also declares sex design category, age gate, visual lane, deliberately_horrific, conditional gates, and exactly three nearest-neighbor names.
Korath is the only record with an explicit blessed_special_gate entry. The other eleven conditional_gates objects contain four keys and omit an explicit non-applicable Blessed entry.

The sex_design_category vocabulary is heterogeneous: male, female, sexless_nonhuman, nonbinary, female_deliberate_horror_exception, sexless_grotesque_once_human, and nonbinary_androgynous all occur. Several of these are descriptive compounds rather than the exact category strings listed in the sealed E055 validator checkpoint.
The conditional-gate values are descriptive applicability strings rather than the PASS, FAIL, or NOT_APPLICABLE verdict vocabulary described in the sealed E055 validator checkpoint.
Cashmere and Luna each name Paisley among their nearest neighbors, but Paisley has no unit psychology record in this twelve-unit file.

Nyxa's deliberate_horror_exception value contains the phrase APPLICABLE_UNANIMOUS_ROUND_1_VISUAL_PASS, embedding a prior-round result claim inside the revealed specification rather than only an applicability declaration.
The specification provides no per-field source citation, author, timestamp, revision history, or artifact hash linking an individual psychology statement to its originating authority.

specified_psychology.current_state: Exhausted shame sharpened into a low accusatory demand.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Compulsory service versus resentment that the protected can walk away.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Bowed head, one exhausted fixing eye, tightened mouth and jaw, crushing broken yoke, low open debt-demanding hand, and planted interception feet.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded a lowered wet-haired head, upward confrontational gaze, loaded jaw, fatigue or burden around the mouth, a fused broken arch, huge planted feet, and one low reaching palm.
The combined hostility, fatigue, bodily damage, and crushing architecture is compatible with exhausted accusation rather than a clean heroic or radiant presentation.
discrepancies: The sealed read found the open hand equally capable of reading as offer, plea, or coercion; it did not unaided isolate a demand that the viewer accept moral debt.

The failed-miracle wound, need for forgiveness, fear that pain is purposeless, compulsory wound transfer, resentment toward protected allies, and indispensability strategy are not visually recoverable from the inspected images.
At 96px the face and emotional state disappear, leaving fused architecture and scale rather than the specified accusation.

specified_psychology.current_state: Absolute possessive stillness while the larval core watches through the only permitted opening.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Protective enclosure versus annihilation of the protected subject's freedom.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: No imposed face; an off-center plum slit and bound larval core inside the crack are the only attention mechanisms, enclosed by nested squeezing plates.

alignments: The sealed read independently identified nested shell plates, closed frontal symmetry, a bound central organism, taut cords, containment, protection, and stillness as the dominant presentation.
The shell-versus-inhabitant relationship visually supports a tension between enclosure and constrained contents.
discrepancies: The sealed face read found two competing face-like structures: an upper purple slit and a lower toothed aperture. It could not determine which owns agency or sensing priority.
The specification names the larval core as the watcher and the opening as permitted, while the image alone also supports armor, prison, parent body, or symbiosis.
The original breach, desire for a perfectly sealed world, fear of independent motion, possessive treatment of allies, and annihilation of freedom are not independently specified by the visuals.
At 96px the unit reduces to one armored pod; slit, core, teeth, cords, and the two-agent tension disappear.

specified_psychology.current_state: Pleasurable certainty while closing an acquisition she believes is already hers.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Inviting proprietary warmth over concealed panic about the blank memory she cannot price.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: One appraising eye, one fractionally unfocused eye, tiny brow pinch, tight jaw, one inviting mouth corner, ledger at hip, and a contract-casting ink hand reaching toward the viewer.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded a mature fit woman, large rigid folio, direct appraisal, subtly lifted brow, controlled mouth, commanding extended hand, and glossy black drips from pointed fingers.
Appraisal, superiority, measured challenge, invitation, and coercion all overlap the specified acquisition behavior.
discrepancies: The sealed face read did not identify the specified unfocused eye, concealed panic, fear response, or break in composure; it noted that the expression can read as beauty-model neutral.
The exact proprietary warmth, erased beloved, fear of unpriced uncertainty, ownership strategy, and treatment of people as assets depend on the specification rather than the face.
The sealed read could not choose among recruitment, control, seduction, and threat, and the immediate combat relationship between folio and dripping hand remained unresolved.
At 96px the black hand, drips, inscriptions, face asymmetry, and folio engraving are not reliably visible.

specified_psychology.current_state: Ingratiating vigilance at the instant before opportunistic theft.
specified_psychology.contradiction: A quick plea to be liked versus active readiness to steal the viewer's valued trait.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: One reward-scanning eye, adaptive please-like-me smile, deferential bow, and a long siphon hand already crossing into the viewer's space.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded one exposed amber eye, asymmetrical closed-mouth smile, forward head tilt, crouched shoulder, and an unnaturally long reaching hand in a stalking or snatching action.
Sly appraisal and anticipated advantage are compatible with opportunistic theft and adaptive social presentation.
discrepancies: The sealed read found the smirk equally capable of appearing mischievous or playful and could not determine whether the viewer is prey, accomplice, or owner.

The image does not independently reveal a plea for acceptance, fear of being permanently defined, identity theft, or a valued-trait siphon; the amber fingertips could be claws, containers, coating, or tools.
The posture read more directly as stalking or snatching than as a deferential bow.
At 96px the action remains a reaching claw cluster, but the adaptive smile, bodily patchwork, and siphon mechanism are not legible.

specified_psychology.current_state: Ecstatic predatory delight at making several deaths coexist.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Ancient grief over lost futures versus feral pleasure in spending them.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: An aged asymmetric face with both eyes narrowed, one delighted mouth corner and one side tightened by temporal pain, compressed behind a spinal membrane bow.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded an aged bat-like predator, deeply narrowed target-fixing eyes, compressed brow, exposed teeth, low clawed crouch, and a huge organic bow under tension.
Focused aggression and predation are strongly carried by the face and whole pose.
discrepancies: The sealed read found both sides of the eyes and brow similarly compressed and could not recover the specified split between delight and temporal pain.
Bow cords obscure the mouth corners, so ecstatic pleasure, ancient grief, and emotional contradiction do not separate unaided from attack aggression.
Multiple futures, irreversible choice, aging entrapment, timeline ammunition, and the consumption of other lives are not recoverable from the inspected images.
At 96px the expression, face split, strings, and most body-to-bow relationships collapse.

specified_psychology.current_state: Vacant fixation on the weakest witness.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Residual longing to approach versus absolute refusal to be known.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Smooth erased face, hollow eye apertures, no mouth, slight target-fixing head cant, low loaded limbs, and a broken blade-ring closing escape.

alignments: The sealed read independently identified a smooth erased oval face, two black eye cavities, no mouth or ordinary features, slight head cant, low stalking posture, and a surrounding field of blade-like tendrils.
Vacancy, dissociation, watchfulness, and target orientation are compatible with the specified immediate state.
discrepancies: No visible target establishes that the fixation is on the weakest witness, and no escape arc is shown in relation to another subject.
The sealed read could not infer desire, fear, residual longing, rejection history, witness removal, or whether visible intelligence exists behind the cavities.
The tendrils could cut, grasp, shield, or propel; their specified procedural role is not independently resolved.
At 96px the face becomes a pale dot or mask and the tendrils merge into a circular mass.

specified_psychology.current_state: Courteous welcome while deciding the exact pain of collection.
specified_psychology.contradiction: A service smile versus clinical predatory measurement.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Controlled viewer-addressing smile, narrowed eye measuring a branding site, ready jaw, compact weight, pear-handled stamp, and long pale receipt in contact.

alignments: The sealed read independently identified a mature pointed-eared figure performing a stamping procedure on a pale record, with heavy lids, unequal eye narrowing, lifted cheek, and a small asymmetric smile.
Private satisfaction, calculation, procedure, and administrative control are compatible with a service-versus-collection contradiction.
discrepancies: The sealed gaze appeared directed toward the task or someone below frame rather than clearly addressing the viewer.
The smile could read as mild amusement, smugness, concentration, or restrained contempt, and the image does not isolate clinical predatory measurement.
Affection converted to debt, fear of unpriced care, reciprocal branding, exact pain of collection, and supernatural enforcement are not independently recoverable.
At 96px the paper survives but the stamp contact, printed rows, face, and procedural threat do not.

specified_psychology.current_state: Intimate approval at the instant she imposes a corrective limit.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Genuine care for potential versus terror-driven ownership of the pupil.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Pinned pupil-facing eyes, one correcting brow and one fear-tightened brow, approving lips, rigid jaw, correction slate, directed open hand, and inflamed nerves.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded a mature fit woman, rectangular diagram tablet, outward open hand, direct backward eye contact, subtly raised brow, lifted cheek, restrained smile, and glowing fissures.
Composed social control, appraisal, confidence, invitation, recruitment, or command overlap the specified corrective intimacy.
discrepancies: The sealed read did not find visible fear, rigid-jaw strain, or a clear split between approval and terror; the face could read as a polished beauty-model expression.
Teacher-pupil dependence, fear of being surpassed, withheld knowledge, ownership, and corrective limits are supplied by the specification rather than visually isolated.
The skin cracks could be power, injury, restraint, or cost, and the tablet could be a focus, shield, document, weapon, or carried board.
At 96px the fissures, pins, facial expression, tablet diagrams, and supernatural cost disappear.

specified_psychology.current_state: Controlled labor rage with anticipatory relief at the coming impact.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Rigid restraint versus desperate desire to feel simple physical release.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Grievance-holding eyes, compressed lips, one cheek twitching toward relief, aligned jaw, and an enormous forward wage-stamp fist.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded direct eyes under compressed brows, one eye more narrowed, loaded jaw, broad grounded stance, torso twist, and an enormous reinforced fist immediately prepared for impact.
Challenge, anger, confidence, and enjoyment or anticipation of force are compatible with controlled rage approaching release.
discrepancies: The sealed crop showed a raised upper lip, visible teeth, and a small uneven grin rather than unambiguously compressed closed lips.
The face remained compatible with a familiar tough-bruiser expression and did not independently specify labor humiliation, lost dignity, fear of complex problems, or a three-blow survival strategy.
The transformed arm's source and bodily cost remain ambiguous among anatomy, active transformation, graft, and grown armor.
At 96px the impact role remains strong, but the face, grievance, relief, markings, and deformation logic disappear.

specified_psychology.current_state: Warm invitation split by cool surveillance of an unseen second party.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Performed intimacy versus terror of direct connection that excludes her.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: One gaze pair follows the inviting palm while another tracks a second party; mouth offers safety, lower-lid and throat tension expose fear, and a wide stance tensions one diagonal refractor ligament.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded a mature athletic woman in a wide controlled stance, open forward palm, sideways gaze tied to the extended arm, restrained smile, skin lattice, and bright diagonal strands running toward the opposite foot.
Private confidence, appraisal, satisfaction, invitation, and controlled strand manipulation overlap the specified social-control presentation.
discrepancies: The sealed face read did not identify two distinct gaze pairs or an unseen second-party surveillance mechanism; it recorded ordinary sideways eyes and one subtle brow change.
No visible strain, fear, throat tension, or aggressive compression established terror of exclusion or a split between performed intimacy and surveillance.
Intermediary dependence, manufactured conflict, controlled versions of reality, and the exact function of a refractor ligament are not recoverable unaided.
At 96px the construct becomes one pale diagonal stroke and the face, lattice, multi-strand construction, target, and cost disappear.

specified_psychology.current_state: Faceless circulatory hunger demanding immediate maintenance.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Immovable fortress authority versus frantic certainty that collapse has already begun.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: No humanoid face; the central heart acts as an entitled alarm while auxiliary hearts and vascular tension expose panic, and a rib-cage clamp opens toward tissue.

alignments: The sealed read independently identified a colossal low circulatory body, exposed central heart, red-brown tubes, bone rib cage, many claw supports, and a huge toothed pincer containing a second heart-like organ.
The many planted supports, armored carapace, exposed organs, and crushing pincer visibly combine fortress mass, bodily maintenance, and immediate threat.
discrepancies: The sealed face crop found no unambiguous face, gaze, or attention mechanism and could not establish that the heart is sensory or decision-making.
The central heart could be vulnerability, control organ, lure, or torso; the pincer organ could be a second heart, captured organ, egg, or symbiote.
Frantic certainty, entitlement, stolen grafts, debtor-body maintenance, and refusal of death are not independently readable from the anatomy.
At 96px the pincer-bearing monster remains, but the central spot cannot be distinguished as heart, eye, face, weak point, or ornament.

specified_psychology.current_state: Cold moral satisfaction under a tightly suppressed flicker of doubt.
specified_psychology.contradiction: Unwavering evidentiary certainty versus fear that one contradiction will dissolve the self built around it.
specified_psychology.face_pose_mechanism: Aiming eye fixes proof, scarred eye narrows against contradiction, lips compress with satisfaction, cheek holds denied doubt, and the full wedge converges along the rifle through a mobile field archive.

alignments: The sealed read independently recorded a mature lean rifle user, narrowed sideways eyes, one subtly lower brow, calm steady hands, long wrapped rifle, facial scars, and many marked strips or cloth records.
Calm appraisal, confidence, target tracking, and a record-bound gunfighter presentation overlap the specified cold evidentiary focus.
discrepancies: The sealed read found the eye beside or above the scope rather than clearly aligned through its eyepiece, weakening the specified aiming-eye-to-proof mechanism.
The small asymmetric smile could be portrait polish or amusement; the face did not independently isolate moral satisfaction, suppressed doubt, or fear of contradictory evidence.
Dismissed grievance, conversion of feelings into evidence, reduction of people to proof, and archive function of the strips are not recoverable without the specification.
At 96px the rifle role survives, while face, scope alignment, marked strips, emotional contradiction, and supernatural cost do not.
